violations.text: Infant formula was observed in retail aisle held past its, 'Use By' date. PIC removed product from sale and placed in sealed box in storage room. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The dumpster enclosure area was observed with debris (including large wooden planks). Refuse areas and enclosures must be kept free of clutter and debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Several ceiling tiles throughout the retail area are in poor repair (water damage and staining). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
